intent_tree: {"处理一个MP3文件并确认其清晰度，同时标记主要内容标题": {"选择一个MP3音频文件": {}, "检测音频文件的清晰度（通过信噪比评估）": {}, "根据清晰度结果提示用户是否更换文件": {}, "识别音频内容并生成主要标题": {}}}
task_graph: {"nodes": [{"id": "Node1", "description": "创建文件选择对话框以选择MP3文件"}, {"id": "Node2", "description": "加载所选音频文件以进行后续处理"}, {"id": "Node3", "description": "使用librosa库计算音频信号的信噪比(SNR)"}, {"id": "Node4", "description": "基于SNR值判断音频质量是否合格"}, {"id": "Node5", "description": "向用户显示音频质量警告，并提供继续或终止选项"}, {"id": "Node6", "description": "将MP3文件转换为WAV格式以支持语音识别"}, {"id": "Node7", "description": "调用Google Speech Recognition API转录音频内容"}, {"id": "Node8", "description": "从转录文本中提取第一个完整句子作为标题"}, {"id": "Node9", "description": "输出生成的标题和主要内容摘要"}], "links": [{"source": "Node1", "target": "Node2", "type": "fileSelection"}, {"source": "Node2", "target": "Node3", "type": "loadAudio"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node4", "type": "evaluateSNR"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node5", "type": "qualityCheck"}, {"source": "Node5", "target": "Node6", "type": "userDecision"}, {"source": "Node6", "target": "Node7", "type": "convertToWAV"}, {"source": "Node7", "target": "Node8", "type": "transcribeText"}, {"source": "Node8", "target": "Node9", "type": "generateTitle"}]}
